Need a Last Minute Table? Get one on DINR

At Stofa, we are always open to meeting talented and committed people who have a passion to provide excellent service and food. If you’re interested in applying, please email us at info@stofarestaurant.com with a resume and a brief cover letter describing the position you are interested in.

For kitchen applicants, you can always drop by Wednesday-Saturday from 2PM-4PM with a resume or email one to us at the above address.

Stofa Restaurant is dedicated to providing outstanding service and food, and we are always looking for people with that same drive!
